title: SUPERMEGA build workforce

dialectic.thesis: Build a company that ships AI-native workspaces, not isolated demos.
dialectic.antithesis: Without named owners, workspaces, and review gates, the AI workforce becomes a pile of disconnected experiments.
dialectic.synthesis: A live workforce registry ties build teams, pods, workspaces, and playbooks into one operational machine.

manager_moves: Keep one named team on every module, connector lane, and tenant launch.
Give each pod a bounded read scope, write scope, and review gate.
Treat stale loops and repeated manual recovery as product failures, not operator chores.

build_teams.name: R&D Lab
build_teams.mission: Turn painful workflow reality and incumbent teardown into build-ready wedges.
build_teams.metric: Produces buildable wedges with evidence, owner, and release path.

build_teams.name: Prototype Studio
build_teams.mission: Build fast proof systems against live company data and operator loops.
build_teams.metric: Ships proofs that teach the product what the reusable module must become.

build_teams.name: Module Factory
build_teams.mission: Generalize repeatable proofs into reusable, sellable modules.
build_teams.metric: Promotes pilots into modules that can be sold and supported repeatedly.

build_teams.name: Tenant Launch Pod
build_teams.mission: Turn the product into real deployments for named companies and sites.
build_teams.metric: Gets customers live quickly enough that the platform learns from production.

workspaces.name: Research Backlog
workspaces.purpose: Rank wedges, problems, and product opportunities before engineers build.

workspaces.name: Prototype Floor
workspaces.purpose: Hold pilots, operator recordings, data-entry experiments, and acceptance notes.

workspaces.name: Module Release Desk
workspaces.purpose: Own generalized module contracts, release gates, and launch readiness.

workspaces.name: Tenant Launch Room
workspaces.purpose: Coordinate domains, onboarding, migration, access, and first-week adoption.

delegated_pods.name: Orchestration Pod
delegated_pods.mission: Own specialist agent definitions, handoffs, and tool-routing discipline.

delegated_pods.name: Connector and Protocol Pod
delegated_pods.mission: Turn internal and external systems into reusable tools and resources.

delegated_pods.name: Durable Runtime Pod
delegated_pods.mission: Convert long-running business sequences into resumable workflows.

delegated_pods.name: Prompt and Eval Pod
delegated_pods.mission: Treat prompts, datasets, and evaluation rules as production assets.

instruction_packs.name: Module Readiness Pack
instructions: Do not promote a module until the live route, role model, and operator record are visible.
Keep screenshots, smoke results, and rollout narrative attached to the release packet.
Any repeated tenant-only patch must become a candidate for product generalization.
instruction_packs.done_when: The module is sellable, route-backed, and release-ready.

instruction_packs.name: Tenant Launch Pack
instructions: Start with one live workflow and one role home before expanding the tenant surface.
Map files, inboxes, exports, and owners before enabling write automation.
Treat migration blockers as launch-critical and keep them visible.
instruction_packs.done_when: The tenant is live with one working workflow and a clear next expansion lane.

instruction_packs.name: Runtime Hardening Pack
instructions: Every autonomous write path needs a human rollback path.
Repeated manual recovery means the workflow contract is wrong.
Tool and prompt changes must stay linked to trace evidence and evaluation.
instruction_packs.done_when: Core loops stay inside guardrails and stale job families are visible.
